concerns: The `isValidInference` runtime guard (step 5) goes beyond the ticket scope — the ticket asks for a schema/type, not runtime validation. CLAUDE.md says 'Don't add features beyond what was asked.' Consider deferring to the ticket that first consumes the schema.
The `createInference` factory (step 4) is borderline unnecessary for a single auto-populated field — a plain object literal at call sites would be equally clear. Acceptable if kept to a one-liner.

The testing recommendation 'confirm integration with SignalSnapshot from US-009' is misleading — the schema has no typed coupling to SignalSnapshot, so typecheck will pass trivially without proving integration.

The `marker` field stored per-object is a design choice, not a ticket requirement. The marker could instead be applied at render time via the constant alone, avoiding redundant data on every inference object.
